case_title: UNITED HEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. PRISTINE SUN LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-24-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2017 CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
